effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Once upon a time, a certain young dragon opened the doors to a new world.

effectEN: (You may only have up to four cards with "HEAL" in a deck.)
flavorTextEN:
(D-BT06): Behold my special performance, one that never ends.
(D-SS03): The cheers never cease, and the dancers twirl on.

(D-BT06): Put an end to it while I'm shooting here!
(D-SS03): The endlessly expanding future continues even now.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Even now, mysterious tales of Silver Thorn are told on nights of the pale moon.

effectEN: Additional Effect - You get "During your turn, all of your vanguards get [Power]+10000/[Critical]+1" until end of this fight!
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if your vanguard's grade is less than your opponent's vanguard's grade, this unit gets [Shield]+10000 until end of that battle.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Stem Deviate Dragon".
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.

[CONT]:This card is also regarded as "Rouse Wildmaster, Riley".
[CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, if your vanguard is "Diabolos, "Violence" Bruce", Soul Charge (1), and if you are in "Final Rush", Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: In the past and now, Dark States has been dominated by entertainment and decadence.

effectEN: Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: My soul infused ball can't be stolen by the likes of you!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has five or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put this unit into your soul], choose three of your front row units, and they get [Power]+5000 until end of turn. (The [Power] gained from this unit's boost will be lost)
flavorTextEN: As the wind of killing intent swirls, flowers of blood form all around.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), Soul Charge (1).
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your soul has ten or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
flavorTextEN: The overlapping sharp blades of wind. Anyone who touches it is immediately split into two.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have five or more cards in your soul, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your soul has five or more cards, COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your opponent's back row rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: The time is ripe, to return to its rightful form.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted a vanguard, this gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a vanguard, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets "Triple Drive" until end of turn. (Drive check three times!)
flavorTextEN: We gotta increase the cards we have for attacking, right?

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (VC), choose a card from your soul, call it to your back row center (RC), and Soul Charge (1).
[CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Be it in the stadium or on the battlefield, the brothers are unstoppable.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has five or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and until end of that battle, when your opponent would call cards from their hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: Elder sister talked about this. How it is dangerous to be alone.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: You can somewhat feel elegance from the act… I think.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, if your vanguard is "Master of Gravity, Baromagnes", Soul Charge (1), and if your soul has ten or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw two cards.
flavorTextEN: I recently heard. That it's important to have good footing.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put another rear-guard into your soul], choose a card from your soul, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: It will be needed someday. And the dragon knows it.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), COST  [discard a card from your hand], choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Do not underestimate her. She is a supernatural elite.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Ideals alone are meaningless. Justice without power has no worth.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: That song is passed on to future generations witout fading.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), Soul Charge (1).
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (3)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Your very existence will be erased. We can't leave any trace of you in history after all.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), choose one of your other units in the same column as this unit, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn. If you are in "Final Rush", it gets [Power]+5000 instead of +2000.
flavorTextEN: Entering the labyrinth? That's my cue!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and your opponent cannot call grade 1 or greater cards from their hand to (GC) until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During the battle this unit boosted, if your soul has five or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+2000, and your opponent cannot intercept.
flavorTextEN: Energy refill complete! Please allow me to keep them at bay!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: If your soul has five or more cards, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+15000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This is a scrummage of hell. And this is your one way ticket.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and perform the following according to the number of your opponent's rear-guards.
• Two or less - This unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
• Three or more - Choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN: Degeneration of prosperity. Which side shall the scales tip to tonight?

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your soul has five or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose one of your opponent's front row rear-guards, and retire it.
flavorTextEN:
(D-PR/094): You being here, is something outside of expectations.
(D-PR/239): Foreign objects from the past shall be cut into pieces with this sharp blade.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Desire Devil, Boshokku", COST  [reveal a "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon" from your ride deck], and draw a card.
[AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by your vanguard's ability, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and until end of turn, when your opponent would call cards from hand to (GC), they must call two or more at the same time.
flavorTextEN: Be fearful of my strength! Every one of you are weaklings after all!

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you persona rode this turn, Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by your vanguard's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000/drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](Soul):If your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [put this card into your drop], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This is the abyssal street of the dark night. The world ruled by the greedy dragon.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 3 unit, your opponent cannot intercept until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Ora Ora!! Just as senior said!!

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put two other rear-guards into your soul], choose a card from your soul, call it to (RC), and that unit and this unit get [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Feeling better? Then, I'll be charging in now.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn. Then, if your soul has seven or more cards, for the battle that rear-guard attacked this turn, your opponent cannot call grade 1 or greater cards from their hand to (GC).
flavorTextEN: And thus, you can no longer move.

effectEN: If your soul has four or more cards, Soul Charge (1), choose one of your opponent's attacking vanguards, and it gets [Power]-5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a rear-guard, if you persona rode this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & Soul Blast (1)], and your opponent cannot call grade 1 or greater cards from their hand to (GC) until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: Time to be reckless, I guess. Just for a bit.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the brginning of your main phase, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, Soul Charge (1), and if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: What she attracts is not limited to the gaze of the viewers.

effectEN: If your soul has four or more cards, Soul Charge (1), choose one of your opponent's attacking vanguards, and it gets [Power]-5000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: You can't stand up anymore~? How slovenly~♡

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you persona rode this turn, Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul for your vanguard's ability, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000/drive +1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: The weak exist to be used. If you feel sore about it, then get stronger!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC)1/Turn :When your other rear-guard is put into your soul by your vanguard's ability during your turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a card from your hand, call it to an open (RC), and if your soul has ten or more cards, draw a card. (May be used even if this unit is put into your soul at the same time as other units)
flavorTextEN: The hateful ones will be hunted til the end.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, if you have three or more [Stand] units, COST  [retire this unit], Soul Charge (2), choose up to one card with the same name as your vanguard from your soul, and put it on the top of the deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your soul has five or more cards, all of your vanguards get [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have five or more units, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and Soul Charge (3). Then, if your soul has ten or more cards, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for every three cards in your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), Soul Charge (1).
[AUTO](RC):When your card is put into your soul by Soul Charge, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. (+10000 if Soul Charge (2))
flavorTextEN: Look into my eyes. Yes.....That's a good boy.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
[ACT](RC):If you have a vanguard with "Bruce" in its card name, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Chief! Make the decisive move at once!

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", all of your other units in the same column as this unit get [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 1 card from your soul, and call it to (RC).

nameEN: Evil Eye of Prohibition, Quen Lu
effectEN: [ACT](RC):COST  [Put this unit into your soul], choose one of your rear-guards, and it gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn. Then, if your soul has seven or more cards, your opponent cannot call grade 1 or greater cards from their hand to (GC) for the battle that that rear-guard attacks this turn.
flavorTextEN: And thus, you can no longer move.

effectEN: [ACT](Soul):If your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", COST  [put this card into your drop], choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This is the abyssal street of the dark night. The world ruled by the greedy dragon.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When your vanguard attacks, if you have three or more [Stand] units, COST  [retire this unit], Soul Charge (2), choose up to one card with the same name as your vanguard from your soul, and put it on the top of the deck.
flavorTextEN: Desire Devils are fundamentally selfish and egocentric.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your soul has five or more cards, all of your vanguards get [Power]+2000.
flavorTextEN: A little variation can affect the war greatly.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have five or more units, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and Soul Charge (3). Then, if your soul has ten or more cards, choose one of your vanguards, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Dear butterfly, bring a heart to me.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you are in "Final Rush", this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn for every three cards in your soul.
flavorTextEN: Don't miss my determination, okay?

effectEN: [CONT](RC):If you are in "Final Rush", all of your other units in the same column as this unit get [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Teehee~ I'm gonna shoot noisily~

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits, COST  [retire this unit], choose a grade 1 card from your soul, and call it to (RC).
flavorTextEN: Pierce through the enemy formation, and follow through with a second move.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your soul has five or more cards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: "Danger" creates a sense of true suspense.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Quagmire of Solace, Kheios", reveal the top two cards of your deck, put all normal units from among them into your soul, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[Glitter](This card is a [Glitter] which seeks the Fire Regalis)
flavorTextEN: It means that I am a little familiar with history.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from your hand, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 1 or less card from your soul, and call it to (RC). If your soul has ten or more cards with different card names, choose a grade 4 or less card instead.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [ACT](Soul):COST  [Bind this card], and Soul Charge (2).
flavorTextEN: (D-BT05): Carrying the dreams of children, the pony dashes merrily across the night sky.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put into your soul from (RC) by your vanguard's ability, choose a card from your drop, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If an attack hit your vanguard with "Bruce" in its card name this turn, this unit gets [Shield]+15000.
flavorTextEN: I've already seen that attack pattern from earlier.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put from (RC) into your soul by your vanguard's ability, choose a card from your drop, and put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: Ahh, how frustrating. It's so unsatisfying to be unable to take you down with me.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from your hand, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose a grade 1 or less card from your soul, and call it to (RC). If your soul has ten or more cards with different card names, choose a grade 4 or less card instead.
flavorTextEN: It's not just heroes that get their names carved in history, you know?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, COST  [put this unit into your soul], choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I'll capture them with a two-layered trap that they can't escape from.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon by "Demonic Stone Dragon, Jewelneel", call this card to (RC).
[AUTO](RC):When this unit attacks or boosts, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of that battle. At the end of that battle, put this unit into your soul. (This effect is mandatory)
flavorTextEN: By consuming crystals of demonic power, the dragon expands its power.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :If your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (2)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: One Who Beckons Heavy Thunder, Fulgress
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Drajeweled" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop, put it into your soul, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: Companion of the Deepening Darkness. Lin
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it into your soul, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts a grade 2 or greater unit, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: The madness within will endlessly expand.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you have no other rear-guards, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], choose an "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon" on your (VC), and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of that battle.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When the attack this unit boosted hits a vanguard, if you are in "Final Rush", COST  [Counter Blast (1) & put the rear-guard this unit boosted on the bottom of deck], draw a card, choose one of your other units, and it gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Follow my lead.....And settle it with a bang ♪

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [put another rear-guard into your soul], look at the top card of your deck, and call it to (RC) or put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), choose one of your units, and it cannot be hit until end of that battle. If your hand has two or more cards, choose a card from your hand, and discard it.
flavorTextEN: Picking up on the slightest malice, and beating it down with its twin wings.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, choose up to one card from your drop, and if you do not have the same grade with that card in your soul, put it into your soul.
flavorTextEN: A fun night with the crescent moon. Is there anyone feeling left out?

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if you Soul Blast (4) or more at the same time for the cost of your vanguard's ability this turn, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top two cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them, put it into your hand, and put the rest into your soul. (Count the number of Soul Blast for one cost)
flavorTextEN: Achieve victory by any means... To them, it's instinct.

effectEN: [AUTO][Soul]:When your grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Greedon" in its card name attacks, COST  [bind one other "Desire Devil, Hikou" from your soul as face up], and call this card to a back row (RC).
[AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from soul, if you are in "Final Rush", Soul Charge (2) for every two cards in your damage zone.
flavorTextEN: Cheers fill the arena, every time the trigger is pulled by her.

nameEN: Companion of the Deepening Darkness, Lin
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at two cards from the top of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it into your soul, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your soul has ten or more cards, this unit gets [Power]+10000.
[ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Counter Blast (1)], until end of turn, when you would Soul Charge by your card ability, increase the amount by (1).
flavorTextEN: Shivering from frenzy or fear -- the hearts of the audience are at her whims.

effectEN:
Play this card with COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Kheios" in its card name!
Look at five cards from the top of your deck, choose the same amount of cards as cards with "Kheios" in their different card names in your soul, put them into your soul, and shuffle your deck. Then, if your soul has eight or more cards with different card names, choose up to one card from your soul, call it to (RC), choose up to one of your rear-guards with "Mikani" in its card name, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Now, are we playing with brutal chaos or not?

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is put into your soul from (RC) by the ability of your "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", if you did not Counter Charge this turn, Counter Charge (1).
[AUTO](Soul):When your rear-guard is placed by a card's ability, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", and your damage zone has four or more cards, that called unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: This needs to be translated.

nameEN: One Who Calls Upon Raging Thunder, Furgres
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if you have a vanguard with "Drajeweled" in its card name, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], choose a card from your drop, put it into your soul, and this unit gets [Power]+2000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: All things require preparation.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), look at the top two cards of your deck, choose a card from among them, put it into your soul, and put the rest on the bottom of your deck.
flavorTextEN: With everyone here, I don't have time to feel lonely.

effectEN: [ACT](RC)1/Turn :COST  [Soul Blast (1) grade 1 or greater card], choose two grade 0 cards from your drop, and put them into your soul.
flavorTextEN: I'll end it within me.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: I'll hit it with delayed shots!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from your soul, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and this unit gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Gears approaching from outside your consciousness... There's no easy way to avoid them.

effectEN:
[AUTO]:When this unit is put into your soul from (RC) by the ability of your "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", if you did not Counter Charge this turn, Counter Charge (1).
[AUTO](Soul):When your rear-guard is placed by a card's ability, if your vanguard is "Avaricious Demonic Dragon, Greedon", and your damage zone has four or more cards, that called unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: I don't mind a shorter lifespan, if that means I can eat my fill!

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle your vanguard with "Baromagnes" in its card name attacked, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & retire this unit], choose ten cards from your soul, and return the rest of all cards from your soul to your deck and shuffle it.
flavorTextEN: I'll help you shape up.
